---
title: "calculate_wbgt_from_cimis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## calculate WBGT from CIMIS weather station data


```{r}
library(heatmetrics)
```

```{r}
# load CIMIS data for 2000
files <- list.files(path = "cimis_hourly/2000", pattern = "\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, 
                    full.names = TRUE)
data_list <- lapply(files, read.csv)

# combine files or not??
```

# work with just Station 2 for now
```{r}
# create a look-up table
lookup <- data.frame(file = files, station = sapply(data_list, function(df) unique(df$Station)[1]))

# read station 2 file
station2 <- read.csv(lookup$file[lookup$station==2])
```

# Preprocess WBGT inputs
```{r, warning=FALSE}
# note that missing values from CIMIS become NA in the preprocessed dataframe

# create dataframe for station 2 WBGT inputs
station2_inputs <- data.frame(row.names = seq_len(nrow(station2)))

# year
station2_inputs$year <- as.integer(format(as.Date(station2$Date), "%Y"))

# month
station2_inputs$month <- as.integer(format(as.Date(station2$Date), "%m"))

# day
station2_inputs$day <- as.integer(format(as.Date(station2$Date), "%d"))

# hour
station2_inputs$hour <- station2$Hour/100 - 1

# dday
station2_inputs$dday <- station2$Julian + (station2$Hour/100 - 1) / 24

# lat
station2_inputs$lat <- as.numeric(sub(".* / ", "", station2$latitude))

# lon
station2_inputs$lon <- as.numeric(sub(".* /", "", station2$longitude))

# solar
station2_inputs$solar <- as.numeric(sub(".*'Value': '(-?[0-9.]+)'.*", "\\1", station2$HlySolRad))

# cza: caluclate using heatmetrics calc_cza_int()
station2_inputs$cza <- calc_cza_int(station2_inputs$lat, station2_inputs$lon, station2_inputs$year,
                                    station2_inputs$month, station2_inputs$day, station2_inputs$hour)

# fdir: don't know which calculation to use

# pres: calculate barometric pressure (hPa) from elevation in meters
elev_m <- station2$elevation_ft * 0.3048
station2_inputs$pres <- 1013.25*(1+(-0.0065/288.15)*(elev_m))^(-9.80665*0.0289644/(8.31432*-0.0065))

# pres: take sp from ERA5-Land

# Tair
station2_inputs$Tair <- as.numeric(sub(".*'Value': '(-?[0-9.]+)'.*", "\\1", station2$HlyAirTmp))

# relhum
station2_inputs$relhum <- as.numeric(sub(".*'Value': '(-?[0-9.]+)'.*", "\\1", station2$HlyRelHum))

# speed
station2_inputs$speed <- as.numeric(sub(".*'Value': '(-?[0-9.]+)'.*", "\\1", station2$HlyWindSpd))

# zspeed
station2_inputs$zspeed <- 10

# dT
station2_inputs$dT <- -0.052

# urban: need to derive from NLCD

```

```{r}

```
